page: Microsoft Azure E128ads_v7 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the Eadsv7 family, powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V45 processor. It features 128 virtual CPUs mapped to 64 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, operating at a clock speed of 4.5 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 1024.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. Local storage is bundled, providing 7559 GB of local disk capacity, and the instance is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. The hypervisor layer is managed by Microsoft Hyper-V.

Benchmark evaluations place this server in the top tier across multiple performance dimensions. The AMD EPYC processor achieves a stress-ng multi-core CPU score of 232,766.23 and a PassMark CPU score of 131,808.85. Memory subsystem performance is characterized by a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 11,983.28 GB/sec and a large block uncached write bandwidth of 202.2 GB/sec. Database and transactional capabilities are demonstrated by a Redis SET throughput of 171.99 million operations per second and a PassMark database operations score of 40,176.82, both ranking in the top 10% of tested systems.

For specialized workloads, the server demonstrates strong computational capabilities, processing 135M parameter LLM prompts at 5,756.53 tokens per second and 7B parameter LLM text generation at 66.06 tokens per second. While the system lacks dedicated GPU hardware, its high CPU core count and substantial memory bandwidth support large-scale parallel processing. The qualitative cost profile reflects a premium resource tier, offering high memory-to-vCPU density and substantial local storage. This configuration is suitable for memory-intensive databases, large-scale Redis deployments, data warehousing, and high-throughput static web serving.
description: Microsoft Azure E128ads_v7 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server from the Eadsv7 family, powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V45 processor running at 4.5 GHz. It features 128 vCPUs, 1024.0 GB of RAM, and 7559 GB of local storage. Operating under Microsoft Hyper-V, the server delivers top-tier performance, as evidenced by a stress-ng multi-core score of 232,766.23 and a Redis SET throughput of 171.99 million operations per second. Its memory subsystem achieves a cached read bandwidth of 11,983.28 GB/sec. Lacking a dedicated GPU, the server relies on its high core count and 8.0 GB of RAM per core to handle demanding tasks. This hardware profile is optimized for memory-intensive databases, large-scale transactional caching, and high-throughput data processing workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E128ads_v7 is a memory-optimized server featuring 128 vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and 7559 GB local storage. Powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 CPU, it delivers top-tier database and memory bandwidth performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E128ads_v7 is an x86_64 server with 128 vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and 7559 GB local storage, optimized for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: An x86_64 memory-optimized platform featuring 128 vCPUs, one terabyte of RAM, and over seven terabytes of local storage for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated AMD EPYC 9V45 processor with 128 vCPUs and 64 physical cores at 4.5 GHz.
1024.0 GB of system memory providing a high 8.0 GB per core ratio.
7559 GB of bundled local storage with Premium Storage capability.
Top-tier memory bandwidth reaching 11,983.28 GB/sec for cached small blocks.
Exceptional transactional performance with 171.99 million Redis SET operations per second.
Best suited for memory-intensive databases, large-scale caching, and data warehousing.
